name: DNS Exfiltration Tools Execution
notes:
This rule detects DNS exfiltration tool execution.

Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: DNS Exfiltration and Tunneling Tools Execution
SIGMA Description: Well-known DNS Exfiltration tools execution


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%iodine.exe' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%dnscat2%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY DNS Exfiltration Tools Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%iodine.exe' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%dnscat2%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: DNS Exfiltration Tools Execution
Event description: Detects DNS exfiltration tool execution.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
